title: TOD'S CORNER - 211info
text: TOD'S CORNER TOD'S CORNER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, household goods (including kitchen items), bedding and linens, and other items. Accepts donations of men's clothing, kitchenware, small appliances, bedding and linens, and bathroom supplies. 10202 SE 32nd Avenue Suite 601 Milwaukie, OR 97222 Eligibility: Individuals diagnosed with HIV who have a monthly income below 185% of the Federal Poverty Level Hours: Monday 1pm-4pm, Tuesday/Thursday 2pm-5pm, Wednesday 1pm-3pm Email (503) 349-4699 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 349-4699 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Services: Call for more information. A referral from a case manager is required. Donations: Visit website for needs and location and hours of collection sites. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Columbia, Multnomah, Washington, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday 1pm-4pm, Tuesday/Thursday 2pm-5pm Services: Bedding/Linen * AIDS/HIV Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Electronics/Small Appliance Donation Programs General Clothing Provision * AIDS/HIV Kitchenware * AIDS/HIV Kitchenware Donation Programs Small Kitchen Appliances * AIDS/HIV If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. TOD'S CORNER
